text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross got injured during training, so I've
brought her to the infirmary.
choice_data_list: Sorry, I should have been more careful.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: How come you're apologizin'? This wasn't anyone's fault, so ya can cut the doom 'n gloom.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
'Sides, a scratch like this'll clear up in no time!
C'mon, cheer up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wait a sec, I'm the one who got hurt, so how come I'm tryin' to make you feel better? You're s'posed to be cheerin' me up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha. You're gettin' some color back in your
cheeks now. C'mon, there's still time on the clock.
Let's get back to trainin'!
choice_data_list: I want you to rest for today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, it's not that bad. Light injuries like this
happen all the time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez! Quit gettin' gloomy over everythin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Okay fine, I'll give. Trainin' wouldn't be fun with
you this on edge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sounding disappointed, Tamamo Cross takes
herself back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right! I think I'm good for a light jog!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dang it. I think I might've made it worse.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I'd known this'd happen, I woulda just listened
to ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I see Tamamo Cross back to the dorm, she
makes sure to rest up properly.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right! I think I'm good for a light jog!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I feel fine! I knew it was nothin' serious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her injury doesn't seem to be affecting her very
much. Being mindful of her temporary limits,
Tamamo Cross continues to train.
